O0400C2 Physical Therapy Concurrent Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that physical therapy was administered to the resident concurrently with one other resident in the last seven days. discontinued 09/30/2025
525 O0400C3_PT_GRP_MIN_NUM O0400C3_PT_GRP_MIN_NUM O0400C3 Physical Therapy Group Minutes Number CHAR 4 The data in this column indicates the total number of minutes that physical therapy was administered to the resident as part of a group
